programme.desc: In the Spring Yosemite's spectacular waterfalls combine with an exquisite display of Dogwood blossoms to create an awe inspiring experience like no other. Immerse yourself in the wonders of Yosemite in this 2 hour relaxing nature film "Yosemite, Waterfalls & Wildflowers". The spectacular cinematography is accompanied by a beautiful acoustic guitar soundtrack.

programme.title: Autumn Inspiration
programme.desc: Witness the beauty of the autumn seasons around the United States in this 35 minute program. This video showcases the diversity of our country's spectacular landscapes. Experience changing colors, from the Sierra Nevada Mountains to the Rockies to the Eastern USA. The photography and cinematography of Olof and Elizabeth Carmel is paired with relaxing music to provide an exquisite "ambient art" experience for TV and mobile devices.

programme.title: Glowing Fireplace with Acoustic Christmas Music
programme.desc: Enjoy 3 hours of Glowing Fireplace with Acoustic Christmas Music. Brilliant flames and glowing coals paired with calm and soft instrumental hymns create the perfect holiday ambiance.

programme.title: Fjords & Waterfalls of Norway
programme.desc: Experience the awe inspiring waterfalls and fjords of Norway in this 90 minute relaxing nature film. Soar down plummeting waterfalls and over the dramatic cliffs that plunge into the blue waters of remote fjords. Glimpse historic fishing villages accessible only by boat and relax to the calming soundtrack that accompanies the inspiring scenery.

programme.title: Wildflowers of Texas Hill Country
programme.desc: Experience the legendary spring transformation of the American Southwest. This cinematic journey travels through the rolling hills and granite outcrops of Central Texas, where the landscape is painted in the vibrant blues of the iconic Bluebonnet and the fiery reds of the Indian Paintbrush. A peaceful, high-definition escape into the heart of the Lone Star State’s most colorful season.

programme.title: Gunfight at Red Sands 1963

When ruthless bandits threaten the land and its people, a mysterious gunman takes justice into his own hands. With sweeping desert vistas, tense standoffs, and the first-ever Spaghetti Western score by Ennio Morricone, this action-packed tale blazes with the grit and glory of the frontier.
